tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Windows down on highway forty-five
Radio loud and feeling so alive
Dust on my boots and sun on my skin
Summer's here and I'm ready to begin

[Pre-Chorus]
Nothing but the horizon in my eyes
Wide open fields under painted skies

[Chorus]
Texas sunset, burning gold and red
Every mile I drive clears inside my head
Texas sunset, I was born to run
Chasing down the light before the day is done
Texas sunset

[Verse 2]
Cold one cracked on the tailgate swing
Fireflies dance while the crickets sing
Stars coming out like they're just for me
This is what it means to be free

[Pre-Chorus]
Nothing but the horizon in my eyes
Wide open fields under painted skies

[Chorus]
Texas sunset, burning gold and red
Every mile I drive clears inside my head
Texas sunset, I was born to run
Chasing down the light before the day is done
Texas sunset

[Bridge]
Some people search the whole world through
For a place to call their own
Me, I found it in the rearview
Every back road leads me home

[Outro]
Texas sunset, Texas sunset
Take me home, take me home

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Lights cut to black as the curtain falls
Whispers in the static down these neon halls
Every mask I wear fits a little too tight
Dancing with my demons in the strobe light

[Pre-Chorus]
They want me perfect but I'm cracking through
Watch me break the mold they thought they knew

[Chorus]
Shadow protocol, activate the night
Every scar I carry is my armor in the fight
Shadow protocol, I don't need the crown
Watch me burn the stage before they shut me down
Shadow, shadow, shadow protocol

[Verse 2]
Cameras flash like bullets in the dark
Every headline written missed the mark
They built the cage but I found the key
I'm not what they created, I'm what I chose to be

[Pre-Chorus]
They want me perfect but I'm cracking through
Watch me break the mold they thought they knew

[Chorus]
Shadow protocol, activate the night
Every scar I carry is my armor in the fight
Shadow protocol, I don't need the crown
Watch me burn the stage before they shut me down
Shadow, shadow, shadow protocol

[Bridge]
In the silence between heartbeats
In the space between the lies
That's where you'll find the real me
Burning brighter than their lights

[Outro]
Shadow protocol
Shadow protocol
Activate

[Verse 1]
From every corner of this spinning world
Every flag unfurled, every dream we hold
Millions marching to the same heartbeat
Where the pitch is sacred and the nations meet

Every voice united, every pair of hands

[Chorus]
Glory awaits, feel it in your bones
The whole world's watching, nobody stands alone
Glory awaits, this is what we play for
Every sacrifice was leading to this moment
Glory, glory awaits

From Sao Paulo streets to the lights of Seoul
From Lagos to London, every single soul
Paint your face and wear your colors proud
We're the heartbeat of the roaring crowd

[Chorus]
Glory awaits, feel it in your bones
The whole world's watching, nobody stands alone
Glory awaits, this is what we play for
Every sacrifice was leading to this moment
Glory, glory awaits

[Bridge]
Ninety minutes can change your life
One shot, one chance, one night
The beautiful game, the beautiful fight
We rise together in the light

[Outro]
Glory awaits, glory awaits
The world is ours tonight
Glory awaits

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Started with a vision and a burning drive
Four AM alarm clock, barely staying alive
They said it couldn't happen, wrote me off the list
But every single doubt just fueled my fist

[Pre-Chorus]
I built this empire brick by brick
While they were sleeping I stayed sick

[Chorus]
Empire state of mind, I never stop the grind
Every setback was a setup, watch me shine
Empire state, I'm building something great
From nothing into everything, I'll never hesitate
Empire state

[Verse 2]
Laptop open, dreams are loading up
Failure is my teacher, never giving up
The ones who doubted see me climbing now
I don't need their approval, I just need my vow

[Pre-Chorus]
I built this empire brick by brick
While they were sleeping I stayed sick

[Chorus]
Empire state of mind, I never stop the grind
Every setback was a setup, watch me shine
Empire state, I'm building something great
From nothing into everything, I'll never hesitate
Empire state

[Bridge]
Self-made, no handouts, no shortcuts taken
Every morning I wake up with my faith unshaken

[Outro]
Empire state, empire state
Watch me rise, watch me rise
